Chat Edit: 'Please dont autoselect a model file and make sure the model dialog is fully functional/wired/utilized to accept messages agentically and unagentically to and from end user to model and back to end user, ensure full autonomous/agent loops and tools are NOT placeholding and ACTUALLY working! Increase the ability to take raw text IE 

"Please blah blah blah" and for it to make sense of it and begin doing things agentically if asked WITHOUT having to use /mission although I havent been able ot fully load a model intot he IDE and get a working reply without it being tokenized or chatter'
